title: Insights into the DNA and RNA Interactions of Human Topoisomerase III Beta Using Molecular Dynamics Simulations
author: Chapagain, Prem
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: hTOP3 simulations for both covalently and non-covalently bound DNA and RNA substrates. Simulation times = 300ns, with 1/ns per frame = 300 frames each.
